overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic indoor facility lobby. The character walks through a modern interior space featuring the Constellation organization logo, contemporary furniture, and eventually enters a security checkpoint room.

scene_state.functional_zone: facility entrance corridor with glass partitions

events.description: character stops conversing with NPC and begins walking forward down the corridor

agents.ego_description: standing and conversing with a female NPC, then turning and walking down the corridor toward the main lobby

notable_agents.action: female NPC standing and conversing with ego at the beginning of the clip

entered.detail: large glass wall with horizontal frames separating the corridor from interior offices
illuminated green emergency exit sign mounted on the wall
tall green plant in a black container near the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor of a futuristic facility where the character is conversing with an NPC. The character then starts walking forward past glass office partitions and emergency signage, heading toward an open lobby area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lobby lounge with constellation organization logo

events.description: exits narrow corridor into spacious open lobby with high ceilings and modern furniture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main lobby toward the large circular wall decoration, passing curved seating areas

notable_agents.action: NPC seated on curved white bench looking at a handheld device
NPC standing near the back wall observing the lobby

entered.detail: large circular organizational logo with blue and white colors mounted on the far wall
modern curved white bench seating arranged in the lobby center
large black geometric container with lush green plants
dark blue carpet section defining the seating area on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious, well-lit lobby featuring a prominent Constellation organization logo on the far wall. The space contains modern curved white sofas, geometric planters with greenery, and blue area rugs over wooden flooring. Other NPCs are present, including one seated on a bench and another standing near the back wall.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the facility toward the security checkpoint, passing the main seating area

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the security door and elevator bank

entered.detail: glass door with SECURITY signage above it leading to the security room
pair of metallic elevator doors next to the security entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the main lobby seating area toward a security checkpoint. A security guard stands near a labeled security door and elevator bank. The geometric planters that were on the right are now passing by on the left as the character approaches the security area.

scene_state.functional_zone: security room interior with monitoring equipment

events.description: passes through the security door and enters the enclosed security office

agents.ego_description: walking past the security guard and entering the security room through the glass door

notable_agents.action: security guard watching as the character passes by and enters the security room

entered.detail: large desk with computer equipment and monitors inside the security office
array of surveillance monitors displaying camera feeds mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the security room through the glass door, passing the security guard. Inside, the room contains a desk with computer equipment and multiple surveillance monitors. The door transitions from being ahead to behind the character as they move into the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow facility corridor into a spacious corporate lobby and finally into a restricted security office. It begins with the character conversing with an NPC in a tight hallway, moving past glass office partitions and emergency signage toward an opening in the architecture. As the space expands, the camera enters a bright, modern lobby characterized by wooden floors, blue rugs, and a prominent Constellation organization logo on the far wall. The movement continues past curved white sofas and geometric planters, shifting the perspective as the greenery moves from the right to the left while approaching a security guard and an elevator bank. Finally, the camera passes through a glass door, leaving the open lobby behind to enter an enclosed security room filled with computer desks and surveillance monitors.
